3015740.name: Ma vie en rogue
3015740.description:
Ma vie en rogue is a roguelike spanning multiple themed dungeons and worlds bringing advancements such as a mini-map, first-person view, and paperdoll customization to the genre. 

Do you have what it takes to plumb the dungeon's mysteries?

Modern features include:

  • Themed "worlds": Adventure in different environments!

  • 1st- and 3rd-person view!

  • Toggleable mini-map! Keep an eye on your location, or turn it off for extra immersion.

  • Difficulty slider: Adjust your challenge level!

  • Paperdoll character display! See what you are wearing and wielding.

With plenty of old-school cool:

  • Hand-drawn pixel art textures, monsters, and items!

  • Permadeath option: For your traditional rogue-style fate.

  • Turn-based action! Play at your own pace.

  • Toggleable TV filter effect! Just like your old CRT monitor.

Personalize your character any way you want!

  • Character creator: Make a player that looks just like you, or try something completely different!

  • Unrestricted color choices for hair and skin. Be green with blue hair, purple with yellow hair; the sky's the limit!

  • Choose your companion! Which pet will be your favorite?

  • Name yourself and your pet what you like, or use the random name generator for unique fantasy names!

Challenging and fun!

  • Dozens of monsters to fight, each with its own style.

  • A wide variety of magic items, weapons and armor!

  • Monster taming: Collect new companions!

  • Friendly NPCs can offer helpful (or unhelpful!) advice and clues.

  • Tricky maze levels!
